summary: Iteration 7 verified the FINAL MASTER REVISION v2. Backend: 19/19 pytest tests PASSED (health top-level probe, /api/contact CRUD + persistence, /api/chat/stream SSE + persistence, guardrail exact-string, and 4 new iter7 scenarios: visa deflect, GPA deflect, Kelley academic story, 2021 US arrival). Fixed 2 flaky test-side bugs by loading /app/backend/.env in test_contact.py & test_chat_stream.py (they were reading default DB_NAME 'test_database' instead of 'portfolio_db' - test-only fix, no product code touched). Frontend UI verified end-to-end: hero-pronunciation exact match, 0 em/en dashes in visible copy, 0 banned words (visa/OPT/immigration/sponsorship/work authorization/stay-back), journey-stop-1 shows '2002 - 2021' New Delhi, journey-stop-2 shows '2021 - 2026' Bloomington, journey-closing = 'THE DISTANCE WAS THE EASY PART.', global-background renders S/D/D'/P*/Q* labels visibly behind content, ubi-github-link points to correct GitHub repo with target=_blank, grammys-funnel visible, project-03 shows Problem/Approach/Result. Contact form POST returned 200 with success toast + mailto draft (expected). Mobile 390px: NO horizontal overflow at any section (hero/projects/education/contact all scrollWidth=390). Chatbot 'Why did he leave Kelley?' returned the exact academic story (no economics major, moved to Arts & Sciences, quantitative depth, professors backed, best academic decision) with no em dashes and no banned words. Resume PDF returns 200.
critical_code_review_comments: Two Recharts console warnings on hero load: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. Non-blocking but suggests a ResponsiveContainer nested in a parent with unresolved dimensions (likely the UBI chart mounted off-screen). Consider adding minWidth/minHeight or defer render until in-view.
seed_data_creation: None (TEST_ contact rows cleaned up by test).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests now load /app/backend/.env so DB_NAME resolves to portfolio_db - keep this pattern for any new persistence tests. All copy-related checks (em dash, banned words, date corrections, journey stops, hero pronunciation) are green. Global background diagram renders behind content without contrast issues. Chatbot guardrail returns EXACTLY 'Best to email Shreyshth directly.' for visa/GPA/off-topic, and the Kelley academic story for the switch question.
